name: edit-guardrails
description: PreToolUse guardrails for Write/Edit/MultiEdit: block mojibake, LF-only PowerShell, lockfile and secret edits; warn on manifest and $HOME leaks. Block Read on files with non-UTF-8 bytes, ESC sequences or other terminal-breaking control bytes. Also auto-allows redundant mkdir -p ~/.claude/plans on Bash to skip plan-mode confirmation.
